# @tyravel/echo

Laravel Echo-style browser client for Tyravel broadcasting

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/echo
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `1.0.3` |
| Source | [`packages/echo`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/echo) |
| Category | Views & client |
| Node.js | `>=26` |
